commit.message:
docs: add planning docs and update progress

Add component audit, refactoring plan, and theme study documents.
Remove unused frontend container from docker-compose (runs locally).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: restrict group collapse/expand to chevron click only

Prevent accidental collapse when clicking elsewhere on the group
header (e.g. after editing a cell). Only the chevron arrow button
triggers toggle now.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

design: minimal type-aware empty states for all editable cells

Replace verbose "Cliquer pour modifier..." with quiet type-specific
indicators: dash for text/number, persistent icons for date/phone/
email/location, muted User icon without text, "—" for empty selects.
Icons always visible as anchors so empty→filled transition is smooth.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: replace DossierFilters with ColumnFilters on dossiers page

Extract matchesFilter to shared utility, update dossiers page to use
the same per-column filtering system as board pages. Remove old
DossierFilters component (status + date range only) in favor of
ColumnFilters (type-aware operators for all column types).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

design: add dark/light theme system with next-themes

Install next-themes, add ThemeProvider + ThemeToggle, define CSS
design tokens for both modes in globals.css, migrate ~1500 hardcoded
colors to semantic tokens across all components. Sidebar is light in
light mode, dark navy in dark mode. All color-coded elements (badges,
file types, status indicators) use dark: variants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rename package from com.notification to org.notification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Grafana dashboard by setting datasource UID and enabling histogram metrics

Dashboard panels referenced datasource uid "prometheus" but the
provisioned datasource had no explicit UID. Also enabled percentiles
histogram for HTTP server requests so p95/p99 latency panels have data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Redis cache serialization by using JSON instead of JDK serializer

The default JdkSerializationRedisSerializer requires cached objects to
implement Serializable. Entity classes (User, Device, NotificationTemplate)
don't, causing every @Cacheable call to fail with SerializationException
and resulting in 100% load test failures. Switch to
GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer. Also promote load-client error
logging from DEBUG to ERROR for better visibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace wildcard imports with explicit single-class imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add healthcheck to notification-server for load-client readiness

The load-client was starting before the notification-server Spring Boot
app was ready, causing 100% request failures. Use actuator health
endpoint as healthcheck and require service_healthy condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Docker build by generating per-service settings.gradle

Each Dockerfile was copying the shared settings.gradle which references
all subprojects, but only one subproject's source was available during
build. Generate a minimal settings.gradle with only the target subproject.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: galería de medios y CRUD de usuarios en panel admin

Medios (#62):
- Upload con drag & drop, validación tipo/tamaño, thumbnails grid
- Filtros por tipo, búsqueda, paginación, API JSON para selector
- Edición de título/alt/carpeta, eliminación con borrado de archivo

Usuarios (#64):
- CRUD completo con asignación de roles (Admin/Editor/Colaborador/Visitante)
- Validación password (8+ chars, mayúscula, minúscula, número)
- Protecciones: no auto-eliminar, no auto-desactivar, no cambiar propio rol
- Toggle activar/desactivar, badges de rol, audit log

60/76 tareas completadas (78.9%)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: meta tags dinámicos con $meta array + RSS en /blog/feed

- Refactor header.php: usa $meta[title|description|url|type|image]
- Todos los controllers públicos pasan $meta con valores específicos
- Blog posts usan og:type=article con imagen de portada
- Fichas incluyen imagen principal en og:image
- Canonical URL limpia (sin query string)
- Twitter Card con imagen
- RSS movido a /blog/feed (antes /feed.xml)
- Tarea #34 completada (58/76)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: SEO completo — sitemap.xml, robots.txt, RSS feed y meta tags

- /sitemap.xml dinámico con 32 URLs (fichas, categorías, eventos, blog, páginas)
- /feed.xml RSS 2.0 con últimos 20 posts del blog
- robots.txt con Disallow para admin, api, proyecto, storage
- Meta tags: canonical, og:url, og:site_name, og:image, Twitter Card
- Link RSS en header para autodiscovery

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: sistema seguro de cambio de contraseña con validación y fortaleza

- Formulario con contraseña actual, nueva y confirmación
- Validación: 8+ chars, mayúscula, minúscula, número
- Indicador visual de fortaleza (rojo/amarillo/verde)
- Toggle mostrar/ocultar contraseña
- Verificación match en tiempo real
- Audit log del cambio
- Link en sidebar admin
- Campo password_changed_at en usuarios

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: barra de sesión admin visible en frontend público

Muestra nombre y rol del usuario logueado con links a panel admin
y cerrar sesión. Logout ahora redirige al home público.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: ChatWidget polling istf Supabase Realtime (ingen supabase-dep i admin)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: actualizar 26 tareas como completadas en proyecto_tareas

Verificación real del código: frontend bloques 1-8 y admin menú
están implementados. 56/76 tareas completadas, 20 pendientes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: SH assistant website flow — Telegram bridge + Supabase Realtime

- request/route.ts: skickar uppgifter via Telegram Bot API till clawdbot-sh
  (WebSocket fungerar ej från Vercel serverless)
- request/route.ts: sparar tasks i Supabase istf in-memory Map
- status/route.ts: läser från Supabase istf mock/in-memory
- callback/route.ts: uppdaterar clawdbot_tasks → triggar Realtime
- ChatWidget.tsx: Supabase Realtime subscription — öppnar och notifierar
  automatiskt när hemsida är klar. Tar bort VPS-statuskoll (alltid Online)
- 016_clawdbot_tasks.sql: ny tabell för persistent task-tracking + Realtime

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(pragmastat): add compare1 and compare2 options (#3591)

* feat(pragmastat): add --compare1 and --compare2 for confirmatory analysis

Leverage pragmastat v12.0.0's compare module to test one-sample (center/spread)
and two-sample (shift/ratio/disparity) estimates against user-defined thresholds,
producing a verdict of less/greater/inconclusive per metric.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(pragmastat): deduplicate fallback paths and expand mutual exclusivity tests

Extract fallback closures in compute_compare1 and compute_compare2 to eliminate
repeated struct construction across error/empty paths. Add test cases for
--compare1 + --compare2 and --compare2 + --twosample mutual exclusivity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(pragmastat): harden threshold parsing per Copilot review

Trim metric/value after colon split, reject NaN/Inf thresholds,
and add many-pairs warning to compare2 matching twosample behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
Add interactive Proxmox cloud-init VM creator

Interactive bash script for creating Ubuntu 22.04 cloud-init VMs on
Proxmox VE. Auto-detects storage (LVM/ZFS/dir), prompts for all VM
config, and installs qemu-guest-agent + Docker Compose v2 via
cloud-init vendor data on first boot.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: proxmox-cloudinit-script
repository.description: Interactive Proxmox script to create Ubuntu 22.04 cloud-init VMs with Docker Compose v2 and qemu-guest-agent

fix: ローディング豆知識3段切替、現在地ボタンアイコン改善、レイアウト調整

- LoadingScreen: 1.7秒間隔で3つの豆知識を切替、テキスト高さ固定

- ボタン位置を下部カード右端に揃え、間隔調整

feat: stamp base-tier 0-sale cards as no_market (high-confidence $0)

Base cards with 0 eBay sales are confirmed no-market, not unknowns.
- Add save_no_market_batch() — upserts confidence='no_market', fair_value=0
  to market_prices WITHOUT writing to history (no price data to track)
- Add cc.scrape_tier to load_cards SELECT so raw loop can distinguish tiers
- In raw mode: base cards with 0 sales go to no_market_batch; non-base 0-sale
  cards are still skipped (may be search/query issue, not confirmed no-market)
- Stamps scraped_at so stale-days gate skips confirmed no-market cards on rerun
- Fix pre-existing tuple unpack bug in bump_tiers_by_sales call (3-tuple → *_)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add 3 more cards to What You Actually Get section (9 to 12)

Google Maps Ready, Social Media Links, and Ongoing Support cards
added to the web design service page benefits grid.

Add grid/table view toggle to catalog filters

Table view shows: filament name with thumbnail, color swatch, weight,
diameter, min price, and €/kg columns with a detail link per row.

commit.message:
feat: Mobile nav polish and toast improvements

- Active tab indicator dot on mobile nav
- Icon glow effect for active tab
- Safe area inset support for notched devices
- Press feedback (scale-95) on mobile nav items
- Toast notifications: rounded-xl, shadow-lg, 3s default duration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: parchear scipy sparse .A (eliminado en scipy 1.14+) para pygam

pygam._get_quantiles usa modelmat.A donde modelmat es scipy sparse CSC.
scipy 1.14 eliminó .A de todas las clases sparse (equivale a .toarray()).
Se parchean dinámicamente todas las clases sparse que tienen toarray() y no .A.

commit.message:
Add PO number as leading financial identifier across LEM reconciliation

Database:
- po_number column on contractor_lem_profiles, contractor_lem_uploads,
  lem_reconciliation_pairs, labour_rates, equipment_rates
- Unique constraint changed: one profile per PO, not per contractor
- Indexes on po_number for rates and uploads

ContractorProfileWizard: PO number is now required field. Profile is
per-PO so same contractor with different POs gets separate profiles.

LEMUpload: Dropdown shows "PO-4410 — Somerville Aecon" format.
Selecting a profile auto-fills contractor name and stores PO on upload.

LEMReconciliation:
- PO filter dropdown in Contractor LEMs view
- PO column in LEM list table
- PO shown in reconciliation header
- Rate card lookups prefer PO-specific rates, fall back to unlinked rates

LEMFourPanelView: PO badge in header alongside date and crew.

RateImport: PO number field on import form. Existing rates table shows
PO column. Each rate record is linked to a specific PO.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove goals, skills, recommendations pages and prev/next nav buttons

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add split tournament feature: dédoublement A/B for CDB 93-94

When too many players for a qualification day, admins can split a tournament
into two sub-tournaments (A and B) at different locations. Each runs independently,
then results merge into one unified ranking.

Backend:
- Schema: is_split, parent_tournoi_id, split_label on tournoi_ext; assigned_split
  on inscriptions; sub_tournament on tournament_matches
- 6 new API endpoints for split/unsplit/distribute/save/children
- lookup-date returns split info for import page detection
- import-matches handles subTournaments[] tags (multer bracket-syntax fix)

Frontend:
- tournois-list: split/distribute/unsplit modals with two-column player view
- import-tournament: auto-detects split, shows dual A/B upload zones
- inscriptions-list + viewer: A/B badge next to tournament name

V 2.0.288

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: Carambole-tournament-management
repository.description: Gestion des rencontres et préparation des convocations

Fix strftime double-percent bug breaking all date queries

SQLite strftime needs single %Y-%m but queries had %%Y-%%m which
produced literal %Y-%m matching nothing. All LL and Focus queries
were returning zero results on production.

Add Google Analytics (G-SLL2EVJPM5)

docs: document update workaround for Claude Code bug

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Classify AlwaysCombIsAlwaysCombKind → §9.2.2.2 [skip ci]

The test verifies that always_comb elaborates to the kAlwaysComb process kind, confirming it is treated as a distinct procedural block. §9.2.2.2 is the subclause that defines always_comb as a distinct combinational logic procedure. §9.2.2.2.2 only compares always_comb to always @* and does not establish the construct itself.

repository.name: deltahdl
repository.description: DeltaHDL

commit.message:
docs: rewrite README with full project overview and setup guide

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore(pipeline): wrapup — DAG ergonomics sprint run logs

Run logs for 2026-03-08T16-30-34-702Z sprint. All 596 tests pass.
Features: break-on-result, comments/README, default_timeout, prompt_file,
--resume-last, watchdog (idle detection). Zero bugs found in parallel testing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: simplify bootstrap with app.start() and onStart hooks (#96)

* feat: simplify bootstrap with app.start() and onStart hooks

Replace `startServer()` with `app.onStart()` hook pattern. Whether or
not an HTTP server starts is now an implementation detail — if the hono
plugin detects @Controller classes, it registers an onStart hook that
wires the router to EmbeddedServer. Non-server apps work identically.

Before:
  import { startServer } from './AppContext.generated.js'
  startServer()

After:
  import { app } from './AppContext.generated.js'
  app.start()

- Add GoodieBuilder.onStart() for post-startup hooks
- Hono plugin generates app.onStart() instead of startServer()
- Remove createApp, export { definitions } from codegen
- Keep createContext() for testing with config overrides

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: add changeset for simplified bootstrap

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: use top-level await in example main.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: set vite build target to es2022 for top-level await support

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: delete examples/basic (superseded by examples/hono)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: update documentation for simplified bootstrap pattern

Update CLAUDE.md, README.md, and changeset config to reflect:
- app.start() replaces startServer()
- app.onStart() hook replaces generated startServer function
- Remove examples/basic from changeset ignore list
- Update generated file export docs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: move raw Hono API calls from generated code into runtime helpers

Generated code now calls stable @goodie-ts/hono runtime helpers (handleResult,
securityMiddleware, validationMiddleware, openApiMiddleware, corsMiddleware,
mountOpenApiSpec) instead of raw hono/hono-openapi APIs. This decouples
generated code from Hono ecosystem internals.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address PR #96 review findings

- Add missing requestScopeMiddleware to router-helpers.ts and export it
- Remove preSorted: true from GoodieBuilder.start() so user-constructed
  definitions get properly sorted
- Remove null handling from handleResult (project no-nullability convention)
- Use GoodieEnv type for security middleware Context to eliminate as never
  casts on c.set('principal')
- Use DescribeRouteOptions type for openApiMiddleware to eliminate cast
- Add inline comments explaining remaining necessary casts (CORSOptions
  not exported from hono/cors, router schema generics unknowable)
- Add error propagation test for onStart hooks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: restore null handling in handleResult for user controller methods

User controller methods may return null — treat it as 204 No Content
like undefined. The no-nullability convention applies to framework
internals, not to user-facing APIs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: update CLAUDE.md and changeset for runtime helpers refactor

- Add router-helpers.ts to key files table
- Rewrite security/OpenAPI/validation sections to reflect helper pattern
- Add design decision about generated code never importing Hono directly
- Update changeset to mention runtime helpers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: re-export definitions and pass c.env in request scope middleware

Re-export `definitions` from generated code so `TestContext.from(definitions)`
continues to work. Pass `c.env` to `RequestScopeManager.run()` in the request
scope middleware so Cloudflare env bindings propagate correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: always generate buildDefinitions(), add fixtures and provide() to testing

Codegen now always generates `export function buildDefinitions()` — even
without @Value/config — so tests have a stable function entry point.
`definitions` is no longer exported; use `buildDefinitions()` instead.

Testing DX improvements:
- `createGoodieTest` accepts `buildDefinitions` function (with backward
  compat for raw BeanDefinition[])
- New `fixtures` option: `Record<string, (ctx) => T>` for custom typed
  fixtures (e.g. Hono router) — framework-agnostic
- New `provide(token, value)` on TestContextBuilder for adding test-only
  beans without manual BeanDefinition construction

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: refactor example tests to use dream DX with fixtures and provide()

Refactor hono example integration tests to use:
- `buildDefinitions` as function (not array)
- `fixtures: { app: (ctx) => createRouter(ctx) }` for pre-wired Hono app
- `setup: (b) => b.provide(SECURITY_PROVIDER, ...)` instead of manual
  BeanDefinition construction

Fix fixture ordering with transactional tests: register custom fixtures
on the transactional `.extend()` call so they run inside the transaction
scope (after `_rollback` starts the transaction).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add custom fixtures and definitions factory to createGoodieTest

- Accept `DefinitionsFactory | BeanDefinition[]` so config flows through
  buildDefinitions() before bean construction
- Add `fixtures` option for context-derived test fixtures (e.g. Hono router)
- Cast `.extend()` args at the vitest boundary to work around mapped type
  limitations — return type ensures full type safety for callers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: update changeset and docs for testing fixtures

- Add @goodie-ts/testing to changeset
- Update testing CLAUDE.md with vitest.ts, createGoodieTest, provide()
- Update examples/hono CLAUDE.md test pattern to use fixtures

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: transactional fixture ordering and provide() deduplication

Move custom fixtures to a third .extend() layer so they run after
_rollback starts the transaction. Use a Map for provide() additions
to ensure last-wins deduplication (consistent with override()).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: structured onStart hook, handleResult return type, config caching docs

Add `onStart` field to `CodegenContribution` so plugins declare hook
body lines instead of raw `app.onStart(...)` strings — codegen owns
the wrapping. Widen `handleResult` return type to `Response | Promise<Response>`.
Document that `config()` is evaluated once and frozen across tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: close context on hook failure, consistent buildDefinitions signature, changeset

- GoodieBuilder.start() now closes the context if an onStart hook throws,
  preventing resource leaks from eager beans with @PreDestroy
- No-config buildDefinitions always accepts optional _config param for
  DefinitionsFactory compatibility
- Skip unnecessary config() evaluation in raw-array definitions path
- Document breaking changes in changeset

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: provide() throws when token exists in base definitions

Prevent silent duplicate registrations by throwing OverrideError when
provide() is called with a token that already exists — guiding users
to override() instead. Add test coverage for setup + provide() path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: use DIError instead of OverrideError for provide() conflict

OverrideError's constructor appends "no bean with this token exists"
which is factually wrong when the token does exist. Use DIError with
a clear message instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: fix stale startServer() reference in ServerRuntime comment

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: harden security and improve code quality across packages

- Fix path traversal vulnerability: resolveSafePath now returns the
  resolved checkedPath instead of the unresolved candidate
- Fix grep tool injection: use -F (fixed string) and -- to prevent
  pattern interpretation as regex or flag
- Fix regex pattern compilation crash in policy engine with try/catch
  fallback to escaped literal
- Validate SSH hostname in pod manager to prevent command injection
- Validate modelId in pod renderStartCommand against allowlist chars
- Add running guard to SlackBot.routeEvent to reject events before start
- Fix redundant condition in compactionCutPoint (copy-paste bug)
- Remove dead code in LLM adapter complete() method
- Add edit tool safety check: verify find string exists before replacing
- Extract makeToolResult helper to eliminate ~200 lines of boilerplate
- Improve bash tool quote stripping with dedicated stripOuterQuotes fn

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

스캔 히스토리 저장 버그 수정: scan_date 누락 해결 (#104)

* setScanResultWithCache의 TDZ 에러 수정 (자동등록 로직을 useEffect로 분리)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01RYU2KuoSGyWuX7BNvfA4Tu

* 매수 후보 API를 Supabase 직접 호출로 전환

Railway 백엔드에 후보 라우트 파일이 없어 404 에러 발생하던 문제 해결.
PatternDetector.jsx와 VirtualInvestTab.jsx의 모든 후보 관련 API 호출을
fetch(backend) 방식에서 supabase.from() 직접 호출로 변경.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01RYU2KuoSGyWuX7BNvfA4Tu

* 스캔 히스토리 저장 버그 수정: scan_date 누락 및 정렬 기준 개선

- _create_scan_session에서 scan_date 필드를 설정하지 않아 DB에 null로 저장되던 문제 수정
- _finalize_scan_session에서도 완료 시 scan_date 업데이트 추가
- _save_scan_to_db (폴백 저장)에도 scan_date 추가
- 히스토리 목록/최근 스캔 조회 시 scan_date 대신 id 기준 정렬로 변경
  (scan_date가 null인 기존 레코드도 안정적으로 조회 가능)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01RYU2KuoSGyWuX7BNvfA4Tu

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Feat: Free tier agentic teaser, style discovery notifications, smart context defaults

- Fix regression seed script: add category field to all 20 cases

feat(policy-engine): add cluster characteristic detection (F1)

Implements auto-detection from cluster-level signals:
- Cloud provider detection (AWS EKS, GCP GKE, Azure AKS, on-prem)
  from node labels: eks.amazonaws.com/nodegroup, cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool,
  kubernetes.azure.com/agentpool, topology.kubernetes.io/region
- Environment signals from node labels and taints
  (environment=prod, dedicated=staging, tier=dev, etc.)
- Contributes up to +0.3 confidence boost when cluster signals confirm
  the namespace-derived environment type (Factor 7 in the algorithm)

Gracefully degrades when nodes are unreachable (returns empty result,
no error propagated). All existing tests pass.

commit.message:
feat(v1.6.0): Calendar + Gossip Protocol — cross-instance event indexing

## Calendrier communautaire
- Migration 041 : tables `events` (RSVP, capacité, lieu, tags, cover) + `event_rsvps`
- `routes/events.ts` : CRUD complet — liste, détail, créer, éditer, annuler, supprimer
- RSVP : going / maybe / not_going avec limite de places, broadcast Socket.IO
- Frontend : /calendar (à venir/passés, groupés par mois), /calendar/new, /calendar/[id]
- Lien Calendrier ajouté dans la navigation principale

## Gossip Protocol — propagation naturelle inter-instances
- Migration 042 : `network_index` + `content_type` (thread|event) + `content_id`
  + `starts_at`, `ends_at`, `location`, `is_cancelled` pour les événements
- `POST /api/directory/gossip/receive` : endpoint ouvert pour recevoir du contenu
  d'un pair sans passer par le directory central
- `GOSSIP_PEERS=url1,url2` : chaque instance peut propager directement à ses pairs
- Scheduler : `announceEventsToDirectory()` toutes les 10 min + gossip vers les pairs
- Si nexusnode.app est indisponible, le réseau continue de se propager peer-to-peer

## /discover — recherche multi-type
- Filtres : Tout | Discussions | Événements
- Option "À venir uniquement" pour les événements
- Affichage adaptatif : date/heure pour events, réponses pour threads
- Localisation affichée pour les événements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

#25 feat: persistent shell session for Bash tool (#30)

* #25 feat: persistent shell session for Bash tool

Replace stateless Open3.capture3 execution with a PTY-backed
ShellSession that preserves working directory, environment variables,
and shell history across tool calls within a conversation.

Architecture:
- ShellSession: PTY + FIFO-based stderr separation with sentinel
  markers for command boundary detection
- Registry context injection: shared dependencies (shell_session)
  forwarded to tool constructors via keyword arguments
- Chat screen lifecycle: eager creation, cleanup on finalize and
  session switch

Key design decisions:
- PTY with named pipe chosen over tmux (polling overhead, merged
  streams) and Open3.popen3 (deadlock >64KB)
- IO#echo= for race-free terminal echo suppression
- Single compound command for execution (command + exit code capture
  + sentinel marker) to avoid timing issues
- File.mkfifo instead of shelling out to mkfifo

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* #25 fix: join submit thread in finalize to prevent cross-test event leaks

The "does not submit empty input" chat spec flaked because the "sets
loading to true" test spawned a thread that outlived the test. The
thread emitted an AgentMessage to the global Events::Bus after the next
test's message collector had already subscribed.

Store @submit_thread and join it in finalize/new_session so in-flight
LLM calls complete before the bus is torn down.

Also adds flaky-test policy to CLAUDE.md.

* docs: add dev environment and flaky test rules to CLAUDE.md

* #25 fix: harden ShellSession from self-review findings

- Cap stderr buffer at MAX_OUTPUT_BYTES to prevent unbounded memory growth
- Replace blocking Process.wait with WNOHANG + SIGKILL fallback (2s deadline)
- Fix TOCTOU race in FIFO creation (atomic mkfifo with rescue)
- Use SecureRandom.hex for FIFO paths instead of object_id (collision-safe)
- Call cleanup_orphans on initialization to remove stale FIFOs
- Use regex-based PID extraction in cleanup_orphans (robust parsing)
- Narrow bare rescue to specific exception classes
- Add YARD docs for Linux-specific update_pwd and drain_stderr timing
- Add missing stderr truncation test

commit.message:
Add production infrastructure: BullMQ queues, Socket.io real-time, NLP engine, rate limiting, structured logging, and 5 more systems

SSJ3 upgrade — 10 new production-grade systems:
- BullMQ + Redis: 10 persistent job queues with retry, monitoring, crash recovery (setTimeout fallback)
- Socket.io: WebSocket real-time push replacing polling (instant feed/stats/status updates)
- NLP engine (natural): sentiment analysis, TF-IDF keywords, topic classification, semantic similarity
- Bottleneck rate limiter: per-account per-action token buckets with auto-throttle on risk
- Pino structured logging: 14 subsystem loggers, sensitive field redaction, JSON lines in prod
- Zod validation: 15+ schemas, Express middleware, auto-coercion, structured errors
- EventEmitter3 event bus: 11 typed channels decoupling swarm from feed/socket/learning
- Sharp image generator: quote cards, stat cards, memes, thread covers (4 palettes)
- Playwright deep scraper: trending topics, competitor analysis, hashtag monitoring
- Redis connection manager: singleton, lazy connect, graceful fallback

commit.message:
Fix encoding errors, pipeline race conditions, and overhaul strip_tags

Pipeline fixes:
- Fix AVI/MPEG remux with -fflags +genpts for containers with unset timestamps
- Fix corrupt input files with -err_detect ignore_err in ffmpeg encode
- Fix FETCHING race condition between prefetch thread and main encode loop
- Fix tight loop when fetch buffer full (add 30s sleep on failed inline fetch)
- Add retry with backoff for WinError 32 (Plex file lock) in replace stage

Strip tags overhaul:
- Add CamelCase splitting for titles and episode names (TheSopranos -> The Sopranos)
- Preserve name prefixes (Mc, Mac, De, Le, La, Bo) during CamelCase splits
- Add Season.XX.Episode.XX long-form episode anchor format
- Fix false positives: lone uppercase P (not resolution), 710N (not junk), FiNAL (scene tag)
- Add trailing codec remnant strip (H1/H264 glued to words)
- Add space-separated release group detection (EzzRips)
- Add movie mode (--movies flag) for year-anchored movie filename cleaning
- Tighten quality gate to avoid stripping real episode titles (XXX, III, QUARTER)

Dashboard:
- Add re-encode support (custom CQ for already-encoded AV1 files)
- Add process force-kill, Plex env vars, scanner --non-english-csv support
- Fix false positive tag detection (MAX in titles, [Halloween] brackets)
- Reduce REMUX_EXTENSIONS: remove .mp4 false positive

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(design): depth layer — visible grid, floating islands, inner glow

Grid opacity 0.04→0.10: structural depth visible on OLED (not ambient blur)
Island bottom shadow 0 12px 40px: panels float above background plane
Island::before 0.04→0.07: islands lit from within, not just bordered

NERVE+OVERHEAL++NERVE synthesis: Space View depth anchor bleeds into 2D screens
via shared amber language. Grid = distant plane. Islands = floating instruments.

- Copy Selected respects exclusions, Clear button to reset

commit.message:
Only apply fire effect to new correct letters typed while on fire

Previously, when a player caught fire, ALL their previously filled cells
got the fire animation. Now fire only appears on cells filled during the
active fire streak.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Harden redaction safety: strip XMP metadata, default metadata stripping on, use full save

- Strip XMP metadata (set_xml_metadata) alongside standard metadata
- Default strip_metadata to True across config, default_config.json, and GUI settings
- Replace saveIncr() with full save (garbage=4, deflate=True, clean=True) in
  worker's _apply_manual_texts and _apply_rect_redactions to prevent recoverable
  residue in output files
- Add 8 new tests covering XMP stripping, default config, metadata preservation
  when disabled, rectangle redaction permanence, and raw-bytes forensic checks
